scripts.publish:lib: ng build ng-mapcn --configuration production && cd dist/ng-mapcn && npm publish
scripts.build-ui-dev: ng cache clean && ng build ng-mapcn && cd dist/ng-mapcn && npm pack && cd ../.. && npm i ./dist/ng-mapcn/ng-mapcn-18.0.0-beta.4.tgz -f && ng serve demo
scripts.build-ui-dev-clean: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path .angular) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .angular }; if (Test-Path dist) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist }" && ng cache clean && ng build ng-mapcn && cd dist/ng-mapcn && npm pack && cd ../.. && npm i ./dist/ng-mapcn/ng-mapcn-18.0.0-beta.4.tgz -f && ng serve demo
